message:
fix: remove deprecated robot assembly functions and unused wrappers

Remove dead code from robot package:
- Remove deprecated `GetDCGCheck()` wrapper (tests updated to use `GetDCGCheckWithOptions`)
- Remove deprecated `buildSnapshotAgentMail()` wrapper
- Update `robot_dashboard.go` to call `fetchAgentMailData()` directly

Part of bd-j9jo3.9.5: remove legacy robot assembly paths and dead code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
